# "Auroral Displays of Divine Providence"
## Scripture
"But you are a chosen people, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a people belonging to God, that you may declare the praises of him who called you out of darkness into his wonderful light." - 1 Peter 2:9

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the breathtaking displays of the aurora borealis, we are reminded of God's majestic power and providence. The dancing lights that fill the night sky are a testament to the beauty and wonder of God's creation. Just as the aurora borealis illuminates the darkness, our lives as Christians are called to shine with the light of God's presence. We are chosen to be a royal priesthood, declaring the praises of our Heavenly Father who has called us out of darkness into His wonderful light.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the beauty of the aurora borealis, we are reminded of Your majestic power and providence. Help us to shine with the light of Your presence, declaring Your praises to a world in darkness. May our lives be a reflection of Your wonderful light, guiding others to the hope and salvation found in You. As we bask in the glory of Your creation, may we be filled with awe and reverence for Your mighty works. Amen.
